hero.subtitle: Submit your technical challenges, business ideas, or creative projects. Get expert solutions tailored to your needs with transparent pricing and timelines.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process to get your problems solved
howItWorks.step1Desc: Submit a detailed description of what you need solved, your timeline, and budget range.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Receive a detailed proposal with scope, timeline, and pricing for your review.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Approve the proposal, make milestone payments, and receive your custom solution.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Get tips on problem-solving, success stories, and platform updates delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.error: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.

cta.title: Ready to Get Your Problem Solved?
cta.subtitle: Join others who have successfully turned their challenges into solutions.

dashboard.title: My Submissions
dashboard.startFirst: Ready to get started? Submit your first problem!

submit.title: Submit Your Problem
submit.subtitle: Describe your challenge and we'll help you find a solution
submit.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your problem in detail. Include what you've tried, what challenges you're facing, and what outcome you're looking for.
submit.success: Your problem has been submitted successfully!
submit.error: Failed to submit. Please try again.

submissionDetail.noAccess: This submission doesn't exist or you don't have access.
submissionDetail.pleaseLogin: Please log in to view this submission.
submissionDetail.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!

qrCode.title: Scan & Share Instantly
qrCode.subtitle: Access SolveForge on any device or share with friends using our QR code
qrCode.caption: Scan with your phone camera to visit pawint-app.com
qrCode.faqTitle: How to Use the QR Code
qrCode.openCameraDesc: On iPhone or Android, open your camera app and point it at the QR code. A link will appear - tap it to visit SolveForge.
qrCode.shareDesc: Save or screenshot this QR code and share it on social media, in emails, or print it for business cards and flyers.
qrCode.instantDesc: No need to type URLs - scanning takes you directly to SolveForge where you can submit problems and get solutions.
